{{Event Header|StS2 Byrdonis Nest.png}} {{E|Byrdonis Nest|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Overgrowth}}. == Options == {{Frame|Eat the Egg}} {{TS|positive||Gain 7 Max HP.}}
{{Frame|Take the Egg}} {{TS|positive||Add {{C|Byrdonis Egg||2}} to deck.}} == Dialogue ==
You spot an enormous Shambling Beast chase off an injured Green Byrd. In the alcove the byrd fled from, a single unguarded egg lies abandoned. Your stomach gurgles...
{{Frame|Eat the Egg}}
You crack the egg open and gobble it up. Good breakfast.
{{Frame|Take the Egg}}
You gently scoop up the egg and stow it, thinking it may hatch into something useful later.
